summary: Tested the Contractor Dialog Overhaul feature (tabbed Add/Edit dialog with Basic/Bank/Employee Prices/Payment Summary, Lock toggle, Contractor Types View). All 16 backend tests passed (15 initially + 1 that required MONGO_URL fallback from backend/.env now passing). UI smoke + flow test via Playwright passed all assertions: 3-tab Add dialog, 4-tab Edit dialog, lock toggle + red Locked badge, row-level lock PATCH updates UI, Payment Summary renders with zero cards for new contractor. Could not visually verify the View Type dialog because the tenant has 0 contractor types in DB, but backend endpoint fully validated via pytest (empty + with-match + 404 cases).
action_items: (Optional) Seed a demo contractor-type or keep a fixture so UI View-dialog can be visually smoke-tested on empty tenants.
(Optional) Consider adding a UI empty-state message in the Contractor Types subtab when 0 types exist — current screenshot shows an empty table with no guidance.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/labour-contractors correctly enforces name via explicit check even though input model is Optional (good defensive coding).
PATCH uses model_dump(exclude_unset=True) — correct partial-update semantics; confirmed {is_locked:true} alone succeeds without re-sending name.

Payment-summary aggregation logic: 'raised' counts stages in {payment_requested, payment_approved, paid} and 'collected' counts only 'paid' — matches user's choice (iii) of showing both Approved-WO−Paid and Raised−Collected separately. Verified with injected WO having 4 stages of different statuses.
Mongo _id is consistently stripped with projection {'_id':0} — no serialization issues observed.
PlanningBoard.jsx is 2262 lines — over the 700-line guideline; should be split into sub-components (contractor dialog/view dialog deserve their own files).
Lock toggle is visual-only with admin override allowed — implementation matches user's choice (iii) (no server-side permission enforcement on edit/delete of locked rows).
seed_data_creation: Tests self-manage: create TEST_ prefixed contractors and types, insert a fake work_order doc for aggregation test, and teardown after assertions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_contractor_dialog_overhaul.py covers all contractor-dialog endpoints. It reads REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from frontend/.env and MONGO_URL from backend/.env if not in os.environ. Use timeout>=60s for login — preview env can be slow-first. UI test IDs: add-contractor-btn, tab-basic/bank/rates/payments, contractor-lock-toggle, contractor-name-input, rate-skilled-input, rate-semi-skilled-input, rate-unskilled-input, save-contractor-btn, lock-contractor-{id}, edit-contractor-{id}, delete-contractor-{id}, view-type-{type_id}, type-view-empty, type-view-row-{id}.
rca of the issue: No bugs found in this review.
